name: Coraza
description: Inspect and block malicious requests with the Coraza WAF engine running the OWASP Core Rule Set.

USE_CORAZA.help: Activate the Coraza WAF (OWASP Core Rule Set evaluation) for this site.
USE_CORAZA.label: Use coraza

CORAZA_API.help: Base URL (scheme + host + port) of the Coraza WAF sidecar, e.g. http://bw-coraza:8080.
CORAZA_API.label: Coraza Api
